violations.description: Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Wash water and rinse water for three compartment sink was not clean. Wash and rinse waters in 3 tub sink need to be changed.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Store tote of various chemicals away from food items in storage room.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Minor detail cleaning needed.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine sanitizing cycle not maintained at proper concentration.--Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. Dish machine not dispensing chemicals properly. Service machine as needed. Ensure chemicals are designed for commercial use.
